productDisplayName: Levis Kids Boy's Danio Grey Teens Kidswear
description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print in black and green, embroidered branding in red, brand appliqué below the back neck and red soft padding on the inner neck to soak sweatFittingRegular46 cmWash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour likely to bleed Use mild detergent Can dry clean Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Get ready to take your little boy on the style trip of his life with this grey tee. The young little boy will be a part of the big men's gang with this tee from Levi's 1853 series, printed across the chest. Team this with denim shorts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with his small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
